ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used to collect the signal */,
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of physiological signal */,
  "sample_rate" REAL /* Sample rate of the signal in Hz */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the signal in seconds */,
  "acquisition_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method used to acquire the signal */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the signal belongs to */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study the signal is part of */,
  "signal_version" TEXT /* Version of the signal */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was acquired */,
  "signal_status" TEXT /* Status of the signal (e.g., raw, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_acquisition_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_method_id") REFERENCES acquisition_methods ("acquisition_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type (e.g., respiration, heart rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the signal type */,
  "normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range of values for the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_methods" (
  "acquisition_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition method */,
  "acquisition_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the acquisition method (e.g., electrodes, photoplethysmography) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the acquisition method */,
  "device_dependency" INTEGER /* Indicates if the acquisition method is dependent on a specific device */,
  "method_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the acquisition method (e.g., simple, complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the sample belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time stamp of the sample in seconds */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sample */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sample */,
  "flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sample has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_processing" (
  "signal_processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal processing technique */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the technique was applied to */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Name of the signal processing technique (e.g., filtering, smoothing) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the signal processing technique */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing was performed */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_processing_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_calibration" (
  "device_calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device calibration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the calibration was performed on */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of calibration (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "calibration_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_calibration_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_quality" (
  "signal_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal quality metric */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the metric belongs to */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the signal quality metric (e.g., SNR, artifact rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the signal quality metric */,
  "quality_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality metric was assessed */,
  "quality_assessor" TEXT /* Name of the person who assessed the quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_quality_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "research_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_annotations" (
  "signal_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal annotation */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotator" TEXT /* Name of the researcher who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., clinical, technical) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_annotations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)
